Voice Command Processor

GPT-4o-mini intent extraction — test with 25 sample transcripts

Try Your Own

Test Transcripts

create#1expects: create/task

“Add a task to buy groceries by Friday”

Simple task creation with due date

create#2expects: create/habit

“Create a new habit to drink eight glasses of water daily”

Habit creation with quantity

create#3expects: create/goal

“Set a goal to run a marathon by December”

Goal with deadline

create#4expects: create/task

“Add task call the dentist high priority”

Task with priority level

create#5expects: create/habit

“Start tracking my meditation habit”

Implicit habit creation

complete#6expects: complete/habit

“I finished my morning run”

Complete with past tense

complete#7expects: complete/habit

“Mark exercise as done”

Explicit mark as done

complete#8expects: complete/task

“Done with the grocery shopping task”

Task completion

update#9expects: update/habit

“Change my water intake goal to ten glasses”

Update numeric value

update#10expects: update/task

“Move the dentist appointment to next Monday”

Reschedule with date

update#11expects: update/goal

“Set my marathon goal deadline to January”

Update goal deadline

delete#12expects: delete/task

“Remove the task about cleaning the garage”

Delete task by name

delete#13expects: delete/habit

“Stop tracking my caffeine habit”

Implicit habit deletion

query#14expects: query/task

“What tasks do I have due this week”

Query with time filter

query#15expects: query/sleep

“How did I sleep last night”

Sleep query

query#16expects: query/habit

“Show me my habit streaks”

Query habit data

reflect#17expects: reflect/mood

“Log my mood as happy, I had a great day at work”

Mood log with context

reflect#18expects: reflect/sleep

“I slept seven hours last night and feel well rested”

Sleep log with duration and quality

reflect#19expects: reflect/journal

“Journal entry: Today I learned about mindfulness and practiced deep breathing for ten minutes”

Journal with detailed content

reflect#20expects: reflect/mood

“My energy level is about six out of ten today”

Numeric mood rating

edge-case#21expects: unknown/unknown

“asdfghjkl random noise blah”

Gibberish input

edge-case#22expects: create/goal

“Maybe I should start running but I also want to read more books”

Ambiguous multi-intent

edge-case#23expects: unknown/unknown

“Hello”

Greeting, no actionable intent

edge-case#24expects: create/task

“I want to create a task and also log my mood and track my sleep and set a new goal”

Multi-step request (should focus on primary)

edge-case#25expects: create/habit

“Ummm so like I kinda wanna maybe possibly start working out or something I guess”

Hesitant/uncertain natural speech
